source_pr.title: sql: support `SHOW BACKUP METADATA FROM <storage:str>`
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/issues/42913

Problem Summary:
This PR supports the `SHOW BACKUP METADATA FROM` SQL syntax.

### What is changed and how it works?
This PR added a SQL for fetching the backup metadata from an external storage.

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
Added the `SHOW BACKUP METADATA FROM <storage:str>` syntax support.
```

root_cause_explanation: The test was flaky because it relied on nondeterministic result ordering (e.g., missing ORDER BY / unsorted assertions). Result ordering is not guaranteed unless explicitly enforced. This PR stabilizes it by: +Race Enabled: false�True | fmt.Printf("%#v", res.Sort().Rows()) (br/pkg/task/show/cmd_test.go).
